brand_identity.name: Haven
brand_identity.design_philosophy: Fusion of 'Sanctuary' (Soft, Safe) and 'Lab' (Precise, Clean). Avoid sterile medical white; embrace warm, organic neutrals.

primary.name: Deep Sage
primary.usage: Primary buttons, active states, key branding elements

typography.installation: Import 'Young Serif' and 'Manrope' from Google Fonts in index.css

spacing.philosophy: Generous breathing room. If you think it's enough padding, double it.

therapist_dashboard.rules: Dense data, no jagged bottoms, use h-full

containers.card: rounded-xl border border-border/40 bg-white/50 backdrop-blur-sm shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300

buttons.primary: bg-[#3A5A40] text-white hover:bg-[#344E41] rounded-full px-8 py-6 shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-transform hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.secondary: bg-[#F2F4F3] text-[#3A5A40] hover:bg-[#E8EAE6] rounded-full px-8 py-6 border border-[#3A5A40]/10
buttons.ghost: text-[#4A4F4A] hover:bg-[#F2F4F3] hover:text-[#1A1C1A] rounded-lg px-4 py-2

inputs.default: bg-white/80 border-border/60 focus:border-[#3A5A40] focus:ring-[#3A5A40]/20 rounded-lg h-12 px-4

visual_enhancers.texture: Add a subtle noise overlay (opacity 0.03) to the entire app to reduce digital sterility.
visual_enhancers.radius: rounded-xl (12px) for cards, rounded-full for buttons

login_background.usage: Full screen background for login/signup with overlay

therapist_placeholder.usage: Placeholder for therapist profile or 'Book Appointment' section

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text meets APCA standards. Use #1A1C1A for body text on #FDFCF8.

universal_guidelines: DO NOT use generic 'hospital blue' or 'alert red'. Use Earthy tones.
DO NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Young Serif'.
DO NOT center-align everything. Use asymmetry for interest.
Create a 'layout.js' that applies the global texture overlay.
instructions_to_main_agent: You are building 'Haven'. Start by installing the fonts and setting up the tailwind.config.js with the 'Deep Sage' and 'Warm Bone' palette. Build the Therapist Dashboard first using the High Density Bento Grid. Use the provided image URLs for the login page and dashboard widgets. Ensure the 'Assessment' and 'Protocol' tools feel like professional instruments, not just forms.
